long_description:
[COM] Unscheduled Daemonset Pods is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_unscheduled_daemonset_pods.html
TIP Situation: Daemonset pod is down
TIP Short Description: Some compute-agent pods in in-che-prod01-zone2-zonelet01 are not scheduled
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::in-che-prod01-zone2-zonelet01:microservice:compute-agent

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    kube_daemonset_status_current_number_scheduled = 0
    kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled = 51
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'in-che-prod01-zone2-zonelet01' and kube_daemonset_name = 'compute-agent'
Scope:
    kube_daemonset_name in ('compute-agent', 'compute-agent-z')
    kube_namespace_name in ('genctl')

Time:             12/09/2025 03:53 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F38613764%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Name:         [COM] Unscheduled Daemonset Pods
Description:  Some daemonset pods are not scheduled for at least 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    kube_daemonset_name in ('compute-agent', 'compute-agent-z')
    kube_namespace_name in ('genctl')
Segment by:   kube_cluster_name, kube_daemonset_name
Alert When:   avg(max(kube_daemonset_status_current_number_scheduled)) < avg(min(kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled))
Time Aggregation: 10 m
Alert URL:    https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D574776
